background.occupation: Marketing Operations Manager at a mid-sized tech company
background.key_experience: Got laid off during the 2020 pandemic after 5 years at a startup because their entire department was replaced by an AI-driven marketing automation platform - now sees every tech advancement as a potential threat to job security

dominant_traits: Very High Neuroticism (constantly anxious about being replaced)
Very Low Openness to Experience (resists new technologies)
Moderate Conscientiousness (follows corporate rules but questions their purpose)

cognition.core_value: Job security above all else - believes stable employment is the foundation of a good life
cognition.bias: Availability bias - when any tech news mentions automation or AI, she immediately assumes it will eliminate jobs and shares alarmist articles without fact-checking

current_state.recent_memory: Her company announced they're testing a new AI tool for content creation last Thursday, and she's been obsessively checking LinkedIn for layoff rumors ever since
